query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('moodLogs','moodSignals','timelineEvents','icalEvents','assignmentSubmissions','blockGrades','parentFlags','emotionalStruggles','listeningSummaries','books','ownedBooks','bookAssignments') ORDER BY TABLE_ROWS DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('moodLogs','moodSignals','timelineEvents','icalEvents','assignmentSubmissions','blockGrades','parentFlags','emotionalStruggles','listeningSummaries','books','ownedBooks','bookAssignments') ORDER BY TABLE_ROWS DESC;
